_comment: Tier 0 Authentication Policy Silo configuration. Mode controls Audit vs Enforce. Members lists are additive: accounts already assigned to the silo but absent from this file are NOT removed. To remove an account, do it manually via Set-ADAccountAuthenticationPolicySilo -AuthenticationPolicySilo $null.

Members._comment: All entries are SamAccountName. Computer accounts must end with '$'. Sections are grouped for readability only; resolution is done by SamAccountName regardless of the section.
